description: WebPT EMR application nouns. These used to be baked into the generic business-path regex; they are WebPT-specific and belong here so other apps are never judged by them.
llmFlowNotes: WebPT EMR: /patient/, /edoc, /case/, /scheduler/index/data and /user/iam/save are business-critical endpoints — never disable them to make a run green.
expectations: WebPT business nouns protected via playbook, not generic code
